title: cli: init() does not zeroize the 64-byte seed from to_secret_bytes_64
description: In commands.rs::init(), the line 'let seed = id.to_secret_bytes_64()' returns a plain [u8; 64] (not Zeroizing). This array is passed to encrypt_keyfile and then falls out of scope without being zeroized. The 64 bytes of raw Ed25519+HPKE key material remain in heap memory until the allocator reclaims them. Fix: change to 'let mut seed = Zeroizing::new(id.to_secret_bytes_64())' and pass seed.as_ref() to encrypt_keyfile, or zeroize seed explicitly before returning.
